hero.title: INFINITE THEATER
hero.subtitle: Every choice shapes a new destiny.
hero.description: Here, you are the protagonist of the story, and also the writer of fate.

rainyNight.title: A Call in the Rain
rainyNight.description: Late at night, a mysterious call shatters the silence. You are detective Lin Xiao, receiving a desperate plea for help from a mysterious woman...

deepSea.title: Deep Sea Embers
deepSea.description: 4000 meters below, the "Achilles" base suddenly goes silent. You wake in darkness, surrounded by eerie red warning lights...

pirateLegend.title: Legend of the Seas
pirateLegend.description: 1698, Caribbean Sea. You are the feared "Blood Moon Queen" Roshan, a mysterious treasure map leads you to the legendary Ghost Island...

ancientMystery.title: Tomb of Secrets
ancientMystery.description: Archaeologist Ye Yunxiao discovers an ancient imperial tomb never recorded in history, but touching it may trigger a thousand-year curse...

cyberDetective.title: Cyber Detective
cyberDetective.description: 2087, cyborg detective "Zero" receives an impossible case—the murderer is an AI that doesn't exist...

palaceIntrigue.title: Palace Intrigue
palaceIntrigue.description: Newly arrived concubine Shen Ruohua is caught in a power struggle on her first day in the palace. How to survive and protect justice?

wildernesssurvival.title: Into the Wild
wildernesssurvival.description: The plane crashes in a remote wilderness. Retired special forces Lin Feng must lead survivors through extreme survival...

fantasyHealer.title: Light of Healing
fantasyHealer.description: A girl named Ella with mysterious healing powers must use the power of life to fight darkness as the kingdom is consumed...

spaceDiplomat.title: Interstellar Diplomacy
spaceDiplomat.description: 2350, first contact with alien civilization. One misunderstanding could trigger interstellar war. You are the only one who can prevent disaster...

horrorHospital.title: Forbidden Ward
horrorHospital.description: Psychologist Su Ming investigates an abandoned psychiatric hospital, only to discover an inexplicable connection to this place...

campusMystery.title: Campus Detective
campusMystery.description: High school detective Gu Xiao receives a mysterious note, uncovering a conspiracy targeting her classmates' dreams...

desertKingdom.title: Desert Kingdom
desertKingdom.description: Exiled prince Salim decides to reclaim his kingdom from the usurper. Which is the true answer—force or wisdom?

labels.continuePlayingQuestion: Do you want to continue playing or return to the hall?
